editor_signals: Sports homepage excludes fantasy and betting specialty cards.
Source/media headlines are preserved when present.

Homepage is capped to 12 cards with league and source-domain spread.

cards.headline: Jürgen Klopp omitted from goodbye letter by exiting RB Leipzig boss
cards.title: Jürgen Klopp omitted from goodbye letter by exiting RB Leipzig boss
cards.snapshot: Former RB Leipzig coach Ole Werner is unhappy he wasn't given the chance to say goodbye to staff after his surprise dismissal from the club. The managerial angle matters because tactical identity, dressing-room trust and club direction can shift quickly once results or ownership
key_data: Primary signal: manager or coaching pressure
why_it_matters: Soccer news often matters more than routine fixtures because transfers, injuries, managers and club decisions reshape the competitive picture.
World Cup 2026 is now part of the long-range editorial runway, especially when player form, national teams, fitness or federation decisions enter the news cycle.
what_to_watch: Watch club statements, manager reaction, lineup impact, transfer follow-up, table consequences and national-team implications.
Track how World Cup 2026 begins to shape player usage, injury caution, roster decisions and global attention.

cards.headline: Thunder-Spurs Total Hinges on Injury News
cards.title: Thunder-Spurs Total Hinges on Injury News
cards.snapshot: Betting card uses a linked market or game page; no separate source story headline was available.
key_data: GAME: Thunder at Spurs, Game 6, Thursday May 28, 2026, 8:30 p.m. ET.
MARKET: NBA playoff spread, total, moneyline and player props.
LINE / ODDS: FanDuel Research lists Spurs -3.5 and total 219.5.
IMPLIED PROBABILITY: check posted moneyline before publication.
MOVEMENT: compare the opener with current prices before tipoff.
